title: Plastic Half Pint Glasses 50 Pack Strong Disposable Beer Cups 284ml
features: HIGH QUALITY disposable clear plastic half pint cups that are STRONG and STURDY, yet flexible enough to not easily crack or split.
HALF PINT to brim (284ml) shatterproof, stackable, recyclable and UKCA marked.
BPA FREE and can also be REUSABLE if hand washed due to their durability.
FIRM rolled rim with a RIGID base and a grooved grip on the sides, making them comfortable to drink out of and giving them a premium feel compared to other plastic drinkware.
50 PACK, Ideal for parties, picnics, BBQs and drinking beer along with all of your other favourite cold drinks!
description: Pack of 50 premium plastic half pint tumblers (284ml) Don’t mistake these beakers for your average flimsy plastic glassware, they are made out of hard and strong yet flexible polypropylene plastic. Perfectly sized - not too big or small, with a grooved grip on the sides and a solid smooth rim to make it comfortable when drinking out of. Can be used for all of your favourite drinks, from beer and cocktails to water and juice. Safe, shatterproof and BPA free, making them great for kids too. Stackable yet easily separated, recyclable and come with a UKCA mark, meaning they are ideal for any party or event!
